description: Lists schedules on the network that govern the execution logic of scheduled transactions. This includes executed and non executed schedules.

parameters.name: account.id
parameters.description: The ID of the account to return information for

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of items to return

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The order in which items are listed

parameters.name: schedule.id
parameters.description: The ID of the schedule to return information for
